name: @ggui-samples/app-ggui-basic-nextjs
description: Reference Next.js frontend for any MCP-Apps-spec agent backend that mounts ggui renders. Consumes @ggui-ai/react's <AppRenderer> + useMcpAppsChat hook. Talks to a brand-agnostic agent server (claude-agent-sdk / openai-agents-sdk / google-adk) via NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_ENDPOINT_URL. Not published.
